title: microcos peekelii
intro: Microcos peekelii, also known as the "Malaysian oak" or "Kampong tree", is a species of tree in the family Malvaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Microcos peekelii is used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
